reviews.review_description: Owner is racist, controversial (harassing multiple people for innapropriate pictures, i was a victim of him), AND is just weird overall! DO NOT DOWNLOAD

This game is absolutely incredible. From the moment I started playing, it was clear that a lot of love and effort went into every detail. The staff are fantastic—they’re not only professional but also genuinely care about the community, always being responsive, helpful, and willing to make improvements based on player feedback. The owners are equally amazing; they clearly have a passion for what they’re doing and a deep commitment to making the game the best it can be. You can feel the energy and excitement that surrounds it, and it’s obvious there’s so much untapped potential just waiting to be explored. The way everything is structured gives off this sense that the future of the game holds even more greatness, and I can’t wait to see how it evolves. All in all, it’s a great experience and one that just keeps getting better.

The game is fun but only thing is that much people is not mostly on online and that will that’s mostly it for the bad but for the fun it is so fun to play I told my friends about it and they like it to and yeah

This game is so cool, its very fun, scary, and chill at the same time, they have awesome staff, and a discord that is ran very well. Last but not least THE OWNER/JAROLD is so nice and funny, so I highly recommend you play this game. 👍
